questionHtml: Outline two reasons why both models predict that the motion is simple harmonic when a is small.
markschemeHtml:
For both models:
displacement is ∝ to acceleration/force «because graph is straight and through origin» ✓

displacement and acceleration / force in opposite directions «because gradient is negative»
OR
acceleration/«restoring» force is always directed to equilibrium ✓

meta.title: Outline two reasons why both models predict that the motion is simple harmonic when a is small.
